'''zhapara''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:olallieberry|olallieberry]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-p-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:olallieberry|olallieberry]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zhapara
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæpæræth|zhæpæræth]] || [[word:zhæpæræj|zhæpæræj]] || [[word:zhæpæræsh|zhæpæræsh]] || [[word:zhæpæræ|zhæpæræ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhapaparath|zhapaparath]] || [[word:zhapaparaj|zhapaparaj]] || [[word:zhapaparash|zhapaparash]] || [[word:zhapapara|zhapapara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhaparath|zhaparath]] || [[word:zhaparaj|zhaparaj]] || [[word:zhaparash|zhaparash]] || [[word:zhapara|zhapara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhapafrath|zhapafrath]] || [[word:zhapafraj|zhapafraj]] || [[word:zhapafrash|zhapafrash]] || [[word:zhapafraf|zhapafraf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhaparatha|zhaparatha]] || [[word:zhaparaja|zhaparaja]] || [[word:zhaparasha|zhaparasha]] || [[word:zhaparaka|zhaparaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhaparath|zhaparath]] || [[word:zhaparaj|zhaparaj]] || [[word:zhaparash|zhaparash]] || [[word:zhapara|zhapara]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhaparathal|zhaparathal]] || [[word:zhaparajal|zhaparajal]] || [[word:zhaparashal|zhaparashal]] || [[word:zhaparakal|zhaparakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhaparathatha|zhaparathatha]] || [[word:zhaparajaja|zhaparajaja]] || [[word:zhaparashasha|zhaparashasha]] || [[word:zhaparaka|zhaparaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhaparathan|zhaparathan]] || [[word:zhaparajan|zhaparajan]] || [[word:zhaparashan|zhaparashan]] || [[word:zhaparakan|zhaparakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhaparathaoro|zhaparathaoro]] || [[word:zhaparajaoro|zhaparajaoro]] || [[word:zhaparashaoro|zhaparashaoro]] || [[word:zhaparakaoro|zhaparakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
